//: Example Claude Code hook config. Merge the `hooks` block into your repo's .claude/settings.json (do not blindly overwrite it). This makes the no_blocking_issues gate enforced rather than advisory: when the agent stops, the most recent run's review report is checked, and a non-zero exit asks Claude to keep working.

hooks.command: run=$(ls -dt .fadeno/runs/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$run" ] && npx fadeno gate "$run" no_blocking_issues || true
